# INTENT

## User Request

Fix the project editor so title starts empty and required, image preview is visible, save feedback uses a reusable snackbar component, successful save returns to the dashboard, and failed save does not partially reset the form.

## Requested Outcome

Make the project settings flow feel stable and usable during create/edit/save.

## Constraints

- Keep the scope focused on the current project editor flow.
- Introduce a generic snackbar component reusable elsewhere in the app.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
